query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `notification_preferences` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `tenant_company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `digest_enabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `digest_frequency` enum('daily','weekly') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'daily',
  `digest_time` varchar(8) NOT NULL DEFAULT '08:00',
  `digest_day_of_week` int DEFAULT 1,
  `notify_deal_at_risk` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `notify_follow_up_due` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `notify_new_lead` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `notify_task_overdue` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `notify_deal_won` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `notify_meeting_reminder` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `notify_revenue_alert` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `push_enabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `email_enabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `in_app_enabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `scheduled_reports` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenant_company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `saved_report_id` int,
  `report_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `report_config` json NOT NULL,
  `frequency` enum('daily','weekly','monthly') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'weekly',
  `day_of_week` int DEFAULT 1,
  `day_of_month` int DEFAULT 1,
  `delivery_time` varchar(8) NOT NULL DEFAULT '08:00',
  `recipients` json NOT NULL,
  `format` enum('pdf','csv','both') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pdf',
  `is_active` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `last_sent_at` bigint,
  `next_send_at` bigint,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `proposal_views` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `proposal_id` int NOT NULL,
  `tenant_company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `viewer_email` varchar(255),
  `viewer_ip` varchar(64),
  `session_id` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `total_time_seconds` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `sections_viewed` json NOT NULL,
  `scroll_depth_pct` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `viewed_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `last_active_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `completed` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `custom_roles` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenant_company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `base_role` enum('user','admin') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',
  `permissions` json NOT NULL,
  `is_active` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sso_configs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenant_company_id` int NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `provider` enum('saml','oidc','google','microsoft','okta') NOT NULL,
  `is_enabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `entity_id` varchar(512),
  `sso_url` varchar(512),
  `certificate` text,
  `attribute_mapping` json,
  `auto_provision` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `default_role` enum('user','admin') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `custom_field_conditions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenant_company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `field_id` int NOT NULL,
  `condition_field_id` int NOT NULL,
  `operator` enum('equals','not_equals','contains','not_contains','greater_than','less_than','is_empty','is_not_empty') NOT NULL,
  `condition_value` varchar(512),
  `action` enum('show','hide','require') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'show',
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ai_credit_usage_by_feature` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenant_company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `user_id` int,
  `feature_key` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `feature_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `credits_used` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `query_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `period_start` bigint NOT NULL,
  `period_end` bigint NOT NULL,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `whatsapp_broadcasts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenant_company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `template_id` int,
  `message` text NOT NULL,
  `media_url` varchar(512),
  `recipient_filter` json,
  `recipient_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `sent_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `delivered_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `read_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `failed_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `status` enum('draft','scheduled','sending','sent','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `scheduled_at` bigint,
  `sent_at` bigint,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL
);
